element.name: TSynSQLSyn.AddKeyword
element.descr:
Adds a Keyword to the current list of keywords, based on the selected dialect.
The Keyword is not stored as part of the dialect. Changing the dialect will loose any added keywords, and changing it back will not restore them.
The specified "AKind: TtkTokenKind" determines the attribute used to highlight the keyword will.
The optional "AKeywordId: TSqlKeywordId" can be used to set the keyword as a replacement or alternative to the existing keyword of the given kind. This can affect other keywords that depend on scope. It also affects folding.

element.name: TSynSQLSyn.RemoveKeyword
element.descr:
Removes a Keyword from the current list of keywords, based on the selected dialect.
The Keyword is not removed from the dialect itself. Changing, and restoring the dialect will restore any removed keywords.
